posts.title: Granite Embedding Multilingual R2: Open Apache 2.0 Multilingual Embeddings with 32K Context — Best Sub-100M Retrieval Quality
Governance at the Speed of Agents: Microsoft Agent Framework and Agent Governance Toolkit, Better Together
posts.summary: Building powerful AI agents is only half the story, running them safely in production is the real challenge. As customers adopt Microsoft Agent Framework for agent orchestration, a clear need has emerged for robust, built-in governance. In this post, Imran Siddique from the AGT team walks through how Agent Governance Toolkit pairs with Agent Framework […] The post Governance at the Speed of Agents: Microsoft Agent Framework and Agent Governance Toolkit, Better Together appeared first on Microsoft Agent Framework .
posts.author: Imran Siddique, Shawn Henry
